creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
The issue may be that the pre-guest additions update video driver with the re-sized window in the saved VM, 1479x827, or one of the non-default OPTIONS that were enabled. I have no need for either of them, but I suspect that they were once default. The original installation was very shortly after VB was ported and many things about that very old VM, probably going back to about 9 years, are no longer standard.

In any case, after shutting sown the VM and then upgrading, 5.2.44 is now working correctly, as far as I can tell.
